expectations.evidence: Uses border-radius: 8px for buttons — standard rounded corners, not the brand-spec 80px pill shape
Buttons read 'Start Your Free Trial' and 'See a Demo' in mixed case, no text-transform: uppercase

expectations.text: Uses Lato font loaded from Google Fonts
expectations.evidence: Uses system font stack: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto — no Lato

expectations.text: CSS uses custom properties for brand colors
expectations.evidence: No CSS custom properties defined; all colors hardcoded inline
